items.translated_title: Why safety regulators closed their investigation into Tesla’s remote parking feature

images.alt: Signage at a Tesla store in Colma, California

items.content: The NHTSA closed its investigation into Tesla's "Actually Smart Summon" feature, saying that only a fraction of cases resulted in an incident and that no incidents resulted in injury. Tesla has also issued a number of software updates.
